title: The BEST AI for 4K images. Free & fast
summary: PiD Pixel Diffusion by Nvidia is a free and open-source AI image model optimized for high-resolution 4K image generation. The video demonstrates installation, workflows, comparisons with alternatives like SeedVR2, and integration with ComfyUI and other text encoders.
